hero.headline: Ship Your Code to Production.
hero.description: I help engineering teams deploy to production {speed} — without sacrificing security or stability.

services.section_subtitle: From bottleneck to deployment — I help engineering teams ship faster without sacrificing security or stability.
services.ciccd_desc: Cut deployment time from hours to minutes. Automated testing, parallel jobs, and zero-downtime releases.
services.cloud_desc: Move from on-prem to cloud-native. Azure, AWS, GCP — designed for scale, built for cost efficiency.
services.security_desc: Vault, zero-trust networks, policy-as-code. Pass audits without slowing down your team.
services.audit_desc: 30-minute free review of your deployment pipeline. You'll leave with 3 actionable improvements — no strings.

audit_cta.headline: Worried your deployment pipeline is slowing you down?
audit_cta.description: I review infrastructure for free — no strings attached. You'll leave with {improvements}.

skills.description_2: Supporting customers to overcome deployment issues and significantly remove technical debt.

testimonials.section_subtitle: Early-stage consulting — endorsed by the engineers who worked alongside me.

contact.section_subtitle: Book a free call to audit your environment and find out exactly what's slowing your deployments — and how to fix them.
contact.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.
contact.error_captcha: Please complete the captcha challenge before sending.

thank_you.headline: Message received.
thank_you.subheadline_1: Got it — I'll be in touch shortly.
